corpus.title: FMI rebaja proyección mundial de crecimiento a 3% por guerra en Medio Oriente
corpus.signal_text:
FMI rebaja proyección mundial de crecimiento a 3% por guerra en Medio Oriente

El FMI recortó nuevamente su previsión de crecimiento para la economía mundial en 2026, por la guerra en Medio Oriente.

corpus.title: IMF lowers 2026 global growth forecast to 3% but projects rebound in 2027
corpus.signal_text:
IMF lowers 2026 global growth forecast to 3% but projects rebound in 2027

The IMF has cut its global growth forecast for the second time this year, flagging "uncertainty and risks" brought on by the war in Iran. Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez responds to threats from Donald Trump that the US will cut off all trade with his country. And, the heatwave is putting France's power system under pressure.

corpus.signal_text:
IMF Revises Up S. Korea’s 2026 Growth Outlook to 2.6% as Chip Demand Offsets Mideast Crisis

[Politics] : Anchor: The International Monetary Fund(IMF) has significantly raised its growth outlook for South Korea this year, from one-point-nine percent to two-point-six percent. The adjustment was made in the IMF’s World Economic Outlook update for July, announced Wednesday amid the global AI boom. Kim Bum-soo has ...[more...]

[Economy] : The International Monetary Fund(IMF) has significantly raised its growth outlook for South Korea this year from the previous one-point-nine percent to two-point-six percent.
